name: MatrixLab Krea 2 ComfyUI EU-RO-1
readme:
# MatrixLab Krea 2 ComfyUI

Private ComfyUI runtime built from the official Comfy-Org/ComfyUI GitHub repository. Attach Network Volume `matrixlab-krea2-turbo-raw-100gb` in `EU-RO-1` at `/workspace` when deploying.

## Services
- ComfyUI: port 8188
- JupyterLab: port 8888

Jupyter is intentionally configured without a token. Anyone who knows the proxy URL can access it.

The Volume bootstrap downloads and verifies Krea 2 RAW FP8, Turbo FP8, Qwen3-VL 4B FP8, and Qwen Image VAE. Model status: `/workspace/.runpod/models-ready.json`. No Krea workflow JSON files are included in this release.

Compatible target GPUs: RTX 4090 and RTX 5090. Required host CUDA filter: 12.8 or newer.
